entities.name: Phase 1: Requirements & Context
entities.context: A methodology phase for gathering requirements before work begins, typically 5 minutes

entities.name: Success criteria
entities.context: Measurable standards that define when a problem is solved

entities.name: Constraints
entities.context: Limitations that bound solutions including performance, compatibility, and user preferences

entities.name: Scope
entities.context: Explicit boundaries defining what is included and excluded from work

entities.name: Requirements document
entities.context: Deliverable output summarizing problem, constraints, and scope

relationships.context: Phase uses success criteria to define clear objectives
Phase identifies constraints as part of requirements gathering
Phase produces requirements document as its deliverable
